# Clean Project

A minimal project with no issues, used to test the "all pass" scenario in instrlint.

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript (strict)
- Vitest for testing
- pnpm as package manager

## Guidelines

Use the Result<T, E> pattern for functions that can fail.
Follow conventional commits for all commit messages.
Write unit tests for all public-facing functions.

## Architecture

Single-layer architecture: all logic lives in src/.
